name: @tootallnate/barslist
description: Parser for Nintendo's BARSLIST manifest file (ARSL magic) — a tiny string-only index that names a logical audio resource group plus the BARS files belonging to it. Used by Mario Kart 8 Deluxe and other first-party games as a sound-pack table-of-contents.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
